race.comment: INSOLENCE (12) found the line nicely to grab second last time out over this trip at Flemington, making it back-to-back narrow misses to kick off the prep. Peaking now and can is ready to get off the mark. BELLABAMA (5) good effort to finish second last time out over 1300m on turf at Bendigo. Strips fitter third-up and has proven versatile with her speed, so expecting her to land soft from the draw and stalk them into it. RAINY NIGHT (3) strips fitter and gets the blinkers applied first time. Wary of sharp improvement. TOP CONTI (14) returns and is a likely improver in his second prep. Keeping safe.
